intro: Thelypteris haisuli, also known as the Chinese maidenhair fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of Asia. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties.
